title: satureja macrocalyx
intro: Satureja macrocalyx is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as a type of mountain savory. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Satureja macrocalyx include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve cognitive function. Satureja macrocalyx can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or oil, and is often used in traditional medicine and herbal supplements.
